source_groups.source_surface: candidate Worker D1 / landing page analytics
LINE OA 管理後台 / inbound customer-service aggregate

events.title: Open Week 0 P0 aggregate capture
events.purpose: Confirm the current one-variable round, review the focused Next P0 rows, and start collecting aggregate counts.
events.owner_gate: Collect aggregate counts only; do not export customer rows.

events.title: Day 3 minimum sample check
events.purpose: Check whether min_visits=100, min_cta_clicks=20, min_line_adds=5, and min_test_days=3 are met before any winner review.
events.command: npm run data:progress && npm run next-p0:intake && npm run owner:next-action
events.owner_gate: If a valid focused CSV exists, staging still requires --stage --confirm-owner-reviewed.

events.title: Day 7 preferred weekly review
events.purpose: Run the full local weekly loop, refresh scores, archive evidence, and review the approval queue without external actions.
events.owner_gate: Review approval_queue.json before any public route, deploy, GitHub, post, or LINE action.

next_due_event.title: Day 7 preferred weekly review
next_due_event.purpose: Run the full local weekly loop, refresh scores, archive evidence, and review the approval queue without external actions.
next_due_event.owner_gate: Review approval_queue.json before any public route, deploy, GitHub, post, or LINE action.

note: Local capture calendar only. It writes review artifacts and an importable ICS file, but it does not import into Calendar, create reminders, post, deploy, change links, push LINE, mutate customer data, touch payments, delete data, or push GitHub.
